fields.name: Role ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the permission set.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the record.

fields.name: App Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the extension.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the permission set is defined by your organization, the base application, or an extension. You can only edit or delete permission sets that you have created.
